evals.prompt: I need to rebuild our marketing site and want to match Stripe's visual style. Can you pull all the design data from stripe.com — their colors, fonts, button styles, that kind of thing?
evals.expected_output: brand_profile.json with Stripe's color palette, Inter font family, button component styles. screenshot.png showing the full page. summary.md with a readable overview.

evals.prompt: Scrape https://linear.app and give me everything I need to replicate their dark-mode design — the exact colors, typography, any cool effects they use.
evals.expected_output: brand_profile.json with colorScheme='dark', dark background colors, Linear's font stack. design_analysis.json capturing their subtle animations and glassmorphism effects.

evals.prompt: I'm designing a brand guide for a client. Pull the brand assets from their current site at vercel.com — logo, colors, fonts, the works. I need it all in one place.
evals.expected_output: Complete output directory with brand_profile.json, design_analysis.json, summary.md, downloaded logo, favicon, og_image, and screenshots.
